title: Punjab University Notification 2026 - Apply for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: Punjab University has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Junior Research Fellow Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the M.E/ M.Tech, M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the Punjab University Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
